Indicates whether the raster dataset associated with selected overview items are deleted as well. Overview images created within the geodatabase are owned and managed by the mosaic dataset. These managed overview images are always deleted along with the corres

IsDatasetReadOnly

Indicates whether the mosaic dataset is in read-only mode. Mosaic dataset operations do not perform write operations on a read-only mosaic.

virtual bool IsDatasetReadOnly { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Parameters

All parameters associated with the mosaic dataset operation.

virtual IPropertySet Parameters { get; set; }

Returns

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

PrepareResults

Indicates whether the result associated with the mosaic dataset operation will be generated and made available in the Results property.

virtual bool PrepareResults { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Progressor

The external progressor object associated with the mosaic dataset operation.

virtual IProgressor Progressor { get; set; }

Returns

IProgressor

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryFilter

The query filter applied on the selection set to identify the collection of catalog items on which to perform the associated operation. If no selection is specified, the query filter is applied on the entire catalog.

virtual IQueryFilter QueryFilter { get; set; }

Returns

IQueryFilter

Examples

Sample Snippet

RemoveBrokenItemsOnly

Indicates whether only catalog items with broken paths are removed.

virtual bool RemoveBrokenItemsOnly { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

RemoveColorCorrection

Indicates whether color corrrection information is removed from the mosaic dataset and the dodging side-table truncated.

virtual bool RemoveColorCorrection { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

RemoveItem

Indicates whether selected mosaic dataset items are deleted from the mosaic dataset.

virtual bool RemoveItem { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

RemoveSeamlines

Indicates whether seamline information is removed from the mosaic dataset and the seamlines side-table truncated.

virtual bool RemoveSeamlines { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

RemoveUnreferencedInstances

Indicates whether to remove the raster type instances for those which don't have any associated catalog items.

virtual bool RemoveUnreferencedInstances { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ResetRelativePath

Indicates whether the mosaic dataset's relative path is reset to the mosaic dataset's current workspace.

virtual bool ResetRelativePath { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Results

The properties of the result associated with the mosaic dataset operation.

virtual IPropertySet Results { get; set; }

Returns

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

SelectionSet

The selection set that identifies the collection of catalog items on which to perform the associated operation.

virtual ISelectionSet SelectionSet { get; set; }

Returns

ISelectionSet

Examples

Sample Snippet

TouchAffectedOverviewItems

Indicates whether to update the time stamp of all overview items affected by the removal of selected primary items.

virtual bool TouchAffectedOverviewItems { get; set; }

Returns

bool
